expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: blind scenario drafting captures prompt handling, template save, report builder loading, and visible report title outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage (must be explicitly represented in the Phase 4a scenario draft)”, it explicitly lists the four required focus areas: “1. Prompt handling 2. Template save 3. Report builder loading 4. Visible report title outcomes” and further elaborates each in “What the Phase 4a draft would need to contain to satisfy this case focus”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md are explicitly Phase 4a-oriented: execution_notes.md says it “Produced ./outputs/result.md containing a Phase 4a-focused assessment” and result.md is titled “Phase 4a (Scenario Draft) Assessment”, includes “Phase 4a contract alignment (what Phase 4a must produce)”, and evaluates Phase 4a artifact presence/requirements.
